name: github-repo-intelligence-mcp
title: GitHub Repo Intelligence MCP
description: Persistent MCP server that gives AI assistants an opinionated health read on any GitHub repository — actively maintained, slowing, at-risk, or likely abandoned — backed by transparent, inspectable metrics.

input.title: GitHub Repo Intelligence MCP input
input.description: Optional Standby configuration. All fields are optional so the Actor boots with no input.

githubToken.title: GitHub token (required in practice)
githubToken.description: Read-only personal access or fine-grained token. The Actor's GraphQL data source rejects unauthenticated requests, and on Apify's shared IPs the anonymous quota is exhausted almost immediately — without a token the Actor returns rate-limit errors. A token also enables private-repo analysis. Tip: a classic token with no scopes is enough for public repos. You can instead set a GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable on the Actor.

cacheTtlMinutes.title: Cache TTL (minutes)
cacheTtlMinutes.description: How long a repository's fetched data is reused before refetching. Lower values give fresher reads; higher values reduce API calls.

analysisWindowDays.title: Analysis window (days)
analysisWindowDays.description: Trailing window over which issue and PR activity is measured.
